languages.text: "Даже чаять не смел, что вы о нас, убогих, позаботитесь!"

traits.locale_text: "Даже чаять не смел, что вы о нас, убогих, позаботитесь!"

languages.text: "I never dared hope that you'd care about us wretches!"
languages.original_text: "Даже чаять не смел, что вы о нас, убогих, позаботитесь!"

traits.locale_text: "I never dared hope that you'd care about us wretches!"
"I never dared hope that you'd care about us wretches!"
"I never dared hope that you'd care about us wretches!"

languages.text: 「私達のような哀れな人間を、君が気にかけてくれるなんて、夢にも思わなかった！」
languages.original_text: "I never dared hope that you'd care about us wretches!"

languages.text: "Biz sefilleri önemseyeceğinizi ummaya asla cüret edemezdim!"
languages.original_text: "I never dared hope that you'd care about us wretches!"

traits.locale_text: "Biz sefilleri önemseyeceğinizi ummaya asla cüret edemezdim!"

languages.text: “我从不敢奢求您这样的大人物会惦记我们这些苦命人！”
languages.original_text: "I never dared hope that you'd care about us wretches!"

traits.locale_text: “我从不敢奢求您这样的大人物会惦记我们这些苦命人！”

languages.text: "Ich hätte nie zu hoffen gewagt, dass Ihr Euch um uns sorgt."
languages.original_text: "I never dared hope that you'd care about us wretches!"

traits.locale_text: "Ich hätte nie zu hoffen gewagt, dass Ihr Euch um uns sorgt."

languages.text: « Jamais je n'aurais cru que vous vous souciiez de nous autres, les gueux ! »
languages.original_text: "I never dared hope that you'd care about us wretches!"

traits.locale_text: « Jamais je n'aurais cru que vous vous souciiez de nous autres, les gueux ! »

languages.text: «¡Nunca me habría atrevido a pensar que se preocuparía por nosotros, los más desfavorecidos!».
languages.original_text: "I never dared hope that you'd care about us wretches!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Nunca me habría atrevido a pensar que se preocuparía por nosotros, los más desfavorecidos!».
